title: Neja marginata
taxonomy: Neja marginata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The Rubiaceae family consists of about 13,000 species of flowering plants, many of which are tropical. These plants are mostly shrubs or small trees that have simple leaves and produce small, tubular flowers. Neja marginata is native to tropical Africa.
